questions.text: When you buy things — whether it's a gadget, a piece of clothing, or random household stuff — how much does sustainability factor into your decision? Do you actively seek out ethical brands, don't really think about it, or is it somewhere in between depending on the category?

What's your skincare and grooming routine like beyond haircuts? Do you have a specific skincare regimen, any products you swear by, or is it pretty minimal? And how do you feel about fragrances or colognes — do you wear them regularly, save them for special occasions, or not really bother?

When you're at a bar or social gathering, what's your go-to drink order? Are you someone who sticks with one drink all night, likes trying new cocktails, or do you usually just grab a beer? How important is the 'vibe' of a bar or venue to you?

What's your relationship with alcohol and nightlife? Do you enjoy going out to bars, clubs, or late-night gatherings, or is your ideal night more about low-key hangouts? Any feelings about being the 'sober' one in a group, or do you usually match the energy of whoever you're with?

If you had unlimited resources and time, what are 2-3 skills or hobbies you would love to learn or get really good at? This could be anything — playing an instrument, woodworking, cooking a specific cuisine, learning a language to fluency, etc.
